title: Support interface in the top module when creating a library (--lib-create, --protect-lib, and --hierarchical)
body:
The top module is not allowed to have an interface port.

Unlike input/output ports, interface port needs to be tied with interface cell.
V3LinkDot has considerable code for interface handling.

I am thinking of the following approach though I'm still reading the related code 
- modify interface port to interface cell in the top module in early stage of verilation
- treat the interface cell as an interface port when emitting SystemVerilog wrapper
